title: crotalaria sphaerocarpa subsp. polycarpa
intro: Crotalaria sphaerocarpa subsp. polycarpa, also known as the bushy rattlebox, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and wounds, due to its potential health benefits such as pain relief and skin healing. Crotalaria sphaerocarpa subsp. polycarpa can be prepared into herbal remedies, including infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
